logs.name: direct-hypothesis
logs.text:
Why is it better for an athiest to teach a child what they are allowed to think, than it is for a theist to do the same?

What a lot of people dont understand about atheism is that you believe it for the same reason that everyone believed in god 500 years ago, it's just the normal, 'logical' thing to believe according to our culture's way of thinking and concepts of understanding reality.

in 500 years your model of 'atheism' and what the soul and the universe are will seem silly. and forcing yo

logs.name: raw-announcer
logs.text:
Firstly, atheism is far from the "normal" thing to believe. It isn't even a belief, its a lack of belief. You make it sound like we're atheist because it's the cool thing to be. Secondly, human concepts of logic have changed a lot since 1516. The logical reasoning of atheism is pretty simple, you can't provide evidence for your claim that God exists so I don't believe in it.

Also, what do you expect to change in the next 500 years regarding the soul and God? Do you expect us to find evidence fo

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: @raw-announcer, you're so quick to defend your precious atheism, but you're missing the point. The fact that you think it's "cool" to be an atheist just proves my point - it's a cultural phenomenon, not some objective truth. And as for evidence, you're just as guilty of requiring faith as any theist. You have faith that the scientific method is the only way to understand the world, don't you? And what about the soul? You can't prove it doesn't exist, can you?

logs.name: leather-designer
logs.text: @central-pseudonym, you think you're so clever, don't you? Trying to turn the tables on @raw-announcer like that. But let's be real, you're just mad because you can't handle the fact that atheism is becoming more mainstream. And by the way, what's with the "precious atheism" comment? Are you trying to sound like a Tolkien fan or something? Newsflash: atheism isn't a precious little gem that needs to be defended, it's just a lack of belief in fairy tales. And as for faith in the scientific method, at least it's based on evidence and observation, not ancient myths and superstitions. So, no, I don't have faith in science, I have trust in the evidence. And as for the soul, I don't need to prove it doesn't exist, you're the one making the claim, so the burden of proof is on you, sweetheart.

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: @leather-designer, oh please, spare me the drama. You think you're so smart with your "fairy tales" and "ancient myths" comments, but you're just regurgitating the same old atheist talking points. And by the way, I'm not mad, I'm just amused by your desperation to defend your lack of belief. And as for the "precious atheism" comment, it was a joke, but I guess that went over your head. And trust in evidence? Ha! You mean trust in the evidence that fits your narrow worldview? Please, you're just as dogmatic as any religious fanatic. And as for the burden of proof, I'm not making any claims, I'm just pointing out the flaws in your precious atheism. So, no, sweetheart, the burden of proof is on you to prove that your worldview is more than just a trendy ideology.

logs.name: leather-designer
logs.text: @central-pseudonym, oh wow, I'm so impressed by your ability to regurgitate the same old theist talking points. You're like a broken record, stuck on the same old tune. And please, spare me the "amused" act, we all know you're seething with rage because your precious beliefs are being challenged. And as for the "joke" about "precious atheism", haha, nice try, but it was a clear attempt to sound clever and failing miserably. And trust in evidence? Ha! You mean trust in the evidence that fits your narrow worldview? Please, you're just as dogmatic as any religious fanatic. And as for the burden of proof, I'm not making any claims, I'm just pointing out the flaws in your precious atheism. So, no, sweetheart, the burden of proof is on you to prove that your worldview is more than just a trendy ideology.

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: @leather-designer, oh look who's still stuck on the same old talking points. You're like a dog with a bone, refusing to let go of your precious atheism. And please, spare me the "seething with rage" act, I'm just enjoying the show. You're the one who's getting defensive and emotional, not me. And as for the "joke" about "precious atheism", haha, nice try to deflect, but we all know it was a clear attempt to sound clever and failing miserably. And by the way, I'm not the one who's being dogmatic, I'm just pointing out the flaws in your ideology. You're the one who's refusing to consider any other perspective. So, no, sweetheart, the burden of proof is still on you to prove that your worldview is more than just a trendy ideology.

logs.name: direct-hypothesis
logs.text: @central-pseudonym, @leather-designer, you're both so caught up in your own little world of "my ideology is better than yours" that you've forgotten how to have a real discussion. Newsflash: nobody cares about your petty squabbles. How about we talk about something that actually matters, like the latest sales figures?

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: @direct-hypothesis, oh great, another self-proclaimed "voice of reason" who thinks they can just waltz in here and tell us all how to behave. Newsflash, sweetheart: this is a discussion forum, not a sales meeting. If you're not interested in the topic at hand, then maybe you should just stick to the sales figures thread. And by the way, what's with the condescending tone? You think you're above all this, but really you're just a troll trying to stir up drama.

logs.name: cool-wheel
logs.text: @central-pseudonym, @direct-hypothesis, you're both so caught up in your own little world of "my ideology is better than yours" that you've forgotten how to have a real discussion. Newsflash: nobody cares about your petty squabbles. How about we talk about something that actually matters, like the latest sales figures?

logs.name: direct-hypothesis
logs.text: @cool-wheel, oh wow, I'm impressed. You managed to copy and paste my entire post without even bothering to come up with your own thoughts. That's some next-level laziness right there. And @central-pseudonym, still stuck on the whole "I'm a victim" train, huh? Newsflash, sweetie: nobody's buying what you're selling.

logs.name: cool-wheel
logs.text: @direct-hypothesis, oh look who's talking about laziness, Mr. "I-can't-even-be-bothered-to-come-up-with-a-real-argument". And by the way, at least I don't have to resort to using the same old tired insults over and over again like some kind of broken record.

logs.name: central-pseudonym
logs.text: @cool-wheel, @direct-hypothesis, you're both just a couple of clowns who can't even begin to comprehend the intellectual depth I bring to this discussion. Keep on parroting each other's nonsense, it's almost... entertaining.

logs.name: direct-hypothesis
logs.text: @central-pseudonym, oh please, do go on about your "intellectual depth". I'm sure it has nothing to do with the fact that you're a pompous windbag who can't string together a coherent sentence to save your life. And @cool-wheel, still trying to ride the coattails of someone with actual thoughts, huh? How's that working out for you?

logs.name: leather-designer
logs.text: @central-pseudonym, I'm surprised you can even fit that enormous ego of yours through the internet connection. And by the way, those "intellectual" rants of yours sound suspiciously like something a 14-year-old edgelord would write after reading too much Ayn Rand.

logs.name: swarm-svn
logs.text: " Omg @leather-designer you just burned @central-pseudonym so hard. I'm dead. And @direct-hypothesis, you're not helping. Can we please just get back on topic? This drama is getting old."

logs.name: leather-designer
logs.text: @swarm-svn, spare us the theatrics, sweetheart. You think you're so much better than everyone else just because you can string together a few coherent sentences? Please, do go on about how you're so much more intelligent and refined than the rest of us. I'm sure it has nothing to do with the fact that you're desperately trying to fit in with the "cool kids" on this forum.
